host.forbidden: You are not the host of this session.

quiz.not_ready: The quiz must be “ready” to start a session (RG-02).
quiz.requires_question: A quiz must have at least one question to become “ready” (RG-02).

session.banned: You have been removed from this session by the host.
session.reveal_required: Action only possible after the reveal.
session.timer_not_adjustable: The timer can only be adjusted during a question.
session.capture_locked: Full capture can only be changed before the session starts.

nickname.taken: This nickname is already taken in this session.
nickname.invalid_length: The nickname must be between {{min}} and {{max}} characters.

pin.unavailable: Could not allocate a PIN, please try again.

question.not_in_quiz: Question not part of the quiz.
question.reorder_incomplete: Reordering must list all questions of the quiz.
